name: testing
description: TDD standards and test workflows for backend and frontend codebases
---

# Testing

## Overview

Use this skill to enforce TDD and improve test quality across the stack.

## What it adds

- Testing standards: RED -> GREEN -> REFACTOR, fakes over mocks, triangulation.
- Agent: `test-engineer`.
- Prompts: `develop-backend-tests`, `develop-frontend-tests`, `test`.

## When to use

- Adding tests for new features or legacy code.
- Improving flaky or low-value test suites.

## Related prompts and agents

- Use `test` for general testing workflow.
- Use `develop-backend-tests` or `develop-frontend-tests` for targeted suites.
